data.title: As a sprint orchestrator, I can escalate unconfirmed SCs through sonnet and opus and route MISSING SCs to the correct decomposition skill
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add sonnet and opus escalation paths to the SC coverage gate, wire REPLAN_TRIGGER routing for MISSING SCs, and deliver the full test suite for all gate routing logic.
**Why**: Ensures coverage gaps in any SC are detected regardless of how ambiguous the wording is, and routes to the correct decomposition skill before sprint wastes execution cycles.
**Scope**:
- IN: Sonnet dispatch (original SC text + children descriptions only — no haiku verdicts or reasoning), opus dispatch for UNSURE SCs, REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage comment conforming to replan-escalate-signal contract (listing missing SCs), routing to /dso:preplanning (≥1 child has type:story) or /dso:implementation-plan (all children type:task), unit tests for all tier routing paths, integration test (5-SC epic, 3 covered → MISSING detection → correct routing), fail-open test (malformed tier output → skip + warn)
- OUT: Prompt file content (S1), haiku gate foundation (S2a)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, SCs haiku cannot cite are passed to sonnet with only the original SC text and children descriptions — no haiku verdicts or escalation reasoning are included
  ← Satisfies: "Sonnet evaluates each escalated SC independently (without knowledge of why it was escalated)"
- When this story is complete, SCs sonnet marks UNSURE are passed to opus; opus returns COVERED or MISSING only
  ← Satisfies: "Opus is the final arbiter for UNSURE SCs, returning COVERED or MISSING"
- When this story is complete, any SC determined MISSING triggers a REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage comment on the epic conforming to the replan-escalate-signal contract, listing the missing SCs
  ← Satisfies: "Sprint writes a REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage comment on the epic listing the missing SCs"
- When this story is complete, sprint routes to /dso:preplanning when at least one child has type:story, or to /dso:implementation-plan when all children have type:task
  ← Satisfies: "Routes to /dso:preplanning (at least one child has type:story) or /dso:implementation-plan (all children have type:task)"
- When this story is complete, tests cover each tier's routing paths — haiku citation-found, haiku escalation, sonnet COVERED/MISSING/UNSURE, opus COVERED/MISSING
  ← Satisfies: "Tests cover each tier's routing logic"
- When this story is complete, an integration test confirms that an epic with 5 SCs and children covering only 3 triggers gap detection and routes to the correct decomposition skill based on children type
  ← Satisfies: "A test where an epic with 5 SCs and children covering only 3 triggers gap detection and routes to the correct decomposition skill"
- When this story is complete, a test confirms that malformed output from any tier causes the gate to skip with a warning rather than block or crash
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Sonnet dispatch must strip haiku escalation context at the data layer, not rely solely on prompt instruction — pass only raw SC text and children list
- [Testing] All tier routing tests must use deterministic mock agent responses; no real LLM calls during test execution

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
